comment: 60yo female with chronic atrophic gastritis (histologically confirmed on EGD topographic biopsies — Sydney protocol 2 antrum + 2 corpus + incisura), advanced intestinal metaplasia at OLGIM stage III, autoimmune mechanism (anti-parietal-cell + anti-IF antibodies positive, B12 deficiency on replacement, elevated gastrin), no current gastric malignancy. ~5-10x lifetime RR for intestinal-type gastric adenocarcinoma + risk for type 1 gastric NET. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-CHRONIC-ATROPHIC-GASTRITIS-PREVENTION-SURVEILLANCE (EGD q3y with Sydney-protocol biopsies + B12/iron monitoring); alternative = IND-CHRONIC-ATROPHIC-GASTRITIS-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (symptom-driven, B12 + iron only). Validates v0.3 RF-CHRONIC-ATROPHIC-GASTRITIS-PREVENTION pilot (gastric adenocarcinoma + gastric NET risk).
